chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C. P. No. S–735 of 2025 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For order on CMA No.6372/2025. 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 5 a/w reply as at A. 3. For hearing of main case. 26.09.2025 Mr. Qadir Hussain Khan, Advocate for the petitioner a/w the petitioner. Mst. Rukhsana Bibi present in person a/w her two minor daughters. Mr. Ziauddin Junejo, AAG Sindh. I.O/SIP Shehzad Ali of PS Memon Goth. ASHO/SIP Shah Nawaz of P.S. Memon Goth. ------------------------------- The concerned I.O. is present and has submitted a report wherein it is stated that FIR No.220/2025 has been declared as A-Class on 25.08.2025. The petitioner is directed to pursue the remedy available under the framework of the Criminal Procedure Code in terms of the order passed therein and / or seek relief thereafter. Mst. Rukhsana Bibi has produced her two minor daughters who appear to be of suckling age. She has claimed that the petitioner has not been providing any maintenance and put forth other grievances. In light of the minor daughters having been produced before this Court, this petition has served its purpose. The outstanding matters viz. custody are now left to be decided by the Guardians & Wards Judge. The mother Rukhsana Bibi will retain the custody of the minor daughters until this matter is settled by the competent Court. This petition stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Asif
